title: spermacoce pohliana
intro: Spermacoce pohliana, a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, is commonly known as a medicinal herb. It is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory effects. Spermacoce pohliana can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for consumption, and it may also be used topically in the form of a poultice or ointment.
